title: Compiler syntax and analysis baseline
description:
Closed **2026-04-09** at compiler [`1f8d62d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/1f8d62d) (*Finalize compiler parity and stdlib/runtime test updates*).

Spans **compiler-foundation** tasks from [`dd75bff`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/dd75bff) (Initial Commit) through AOT refactor, **pack** command, optional `?.`, file-scoped modules, module-declaration resolver fixes, graph **Std** injection test, and analysis hardening. Establishes the syntax/analysis baseline required before v0.2 pipeline and platform-spec work.
